plugin.name: Walkabout
plugin.description: Makes your pet roam the screen. Wander, follow your cursor, bounce with physics, or patrol back and forth.
config.mode.label: Movement mode
config.mode.description: How your pet moves around the screen.
config.speed.label: Speed
config.interval.label: Move interval
config.interval.description: How often your pet takes a new step.
config.pauseWhenBusy.label: Pause when agent is busy
config.pauseWhenBusy.description: Stop moving while your coding agent is actively working.
